name: zephyr-analyst-desk
description: Six AI analysts run in parallel to produce a full stock research report — fundamentals, technical, news, sentiment, and risk — synthesized by a senior lead with a clear verdict.
longDescription: Zephyr Analyst Desk is a multi-agent stock analysis system. Ask it to analyze any ticker and six specialized AI analysts (KOVA, RAZE, FLARE, HERD, VEIL) run simultaneously, each searching live web data in their domain. ZEPHYR, the team lead, synthesizes all five reports into a structured, opinionated research report with a clear outlook and verdict. Use /zephyr-desk TSLA or just ask 'Analyze TSLA' after installing.

requiredEnvVars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
requiredEnvVars.description: Your Anthropic API key — get it at console.anthropic.com

requiredEnvVars.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
requiredEnvVars.description: Brave Search API key for live data — free tier at brave.com/search/api

tools.name: zephyr_analyze
tools.description: Full team analysis: 5 agents in parallel + ZEPHYR synthesis. Say 'Analyze TSLA' or '/zephyr-desk TSLA'.

tools.name: zephyr_quick
tools.description: Fast ZEPHYR-only take. Say '/zephyr-desk TSLA quick'.

tools.name: zephyr_agent
tools.description: Single analyst. KOVA=fundamentals, RAZE=technical, FLARE=news, HERD=sentiment, VEIL=risk.
